---
name: Suggest an addition
about: Suggest a plugin, theme, tool, or resource for The 24K Vault
title: 'Add [Name]'
labels: suggestion
assignees: ''
---

## Suggestion

**Name:**

**URL** (GitHub or obsidian.md/plugins page):

**Category** (Essential / AI & LLM / PKM & Linking / Writing & Editing / Tasks & Projects / Visualization / Developer & Technical / Sync & Backup / Themes / Tools & Integrations / Resources):

**One-line description** (factual, no marketing language, ends with a period):

**Why it earns a place** (downloads, unique value, what it does that no other listed entry does):

## Checklist

- [ ] Plugin or theme is in the official Obsidian community directory, OR has a `Ready for review` label on its submission PR.
- [ ] Last commit within 12 months. Repo is not archived or deprecated.
- [ ] Plugin or theme has `manifest.json` and a semver GitHub release with `main.js` attached.
- [ ] Description is one line, factual, with no marketing language.
- [ ] Link is live and works.
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing entry without meaningful differentiation.
